valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Sun 31 May 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Mon 01 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Atlantic low moving steadily northeast expected 150 miles west of Rockall 1002 by 1800 Sunday. Low southeast England 1015 losing its identity
